short.en: A pot of fragrant stew bubbles gently on the stove.
short.cs: Na sporáku tiše bublá hrnec voňavé polévky.

long.en: A heavy iron pot of bean-and-vegetable stew sits on the warm stove. The smell of bay leaves and slow-cooked carrots is rich enough to make your stomach answer aloud. A wooden ladle leans against the rim.
long.cs: Na teplém sporáku stojí těžký litinový hrnec s fazolovo-zeleninovou polévkou. Vůně bobkového listu a pomalu vařené mrkve je natolik bohatá, že se ti ozve i žaludek. O okraj hrnce se opírá dřevěná naběračka.

no_target.self: you ladle a steaming bowl of stew from the pot and eat it. Warmth and strength flow back into you.
no_target.others: {actor} ladles a bowl of stew from the pot on the stove and eats it slowly.

to_target.self: you ladle a bowl of stew from the pot and offer it to {target}.
to_target.others: {actor} ladles a bowl of stew from the pot on the stove and offers it to {target}.

no_target.self: naběračkou si naliješ vroucí misku polévky a sníš ji. Vrací se ti teplo a síla.
no_target.others: {actor} si nabere misku polévky z hrnce na sporáku a pomalu ji sní.

to_target.self: naběračkou si naliješ misku polévky a nabídneš ji {target}.
to_target.others: {actor} nabere misku polévky z hrnce na sporáku a nabídne ji {target}.
